roa.docketEntryComment: STIPULATED ORDER DEEMING COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE SERVED SIGNED AND FILED
DA OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO UNSEAL AFFIDAVIT FILED
DEF MOTION TO UNSEAL SEARCH WARRANT FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/   /CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(A), A STRAIGHT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 FOR 2 YEARS OF STATE PRISON, MIDDLE TERM/STATES/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(A), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CTS:1/4019HALF/CTORD:SENTENCE MAY SERVE THRU ELECTROINC MOINTORING WITH GPS,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:NO RESTITUTION OWED/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:300/COLLECT/BE/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFG/DEFT ADV RTS:001/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:07-25-19/PPRF/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:SENTENCING/TWS/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF UNSEALING PORTION OF WARRANT/X:COURT STATES THAT PORTION OFTHE WARRANT HAS BEEN REDACTED BY HER/X:THE REDACTED PORTION WILL BE GIVENTO THE D,A,, LAURA CARWILE/CONTD:TO SET/DOP/
/CAL:DECISION OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO UNSEAL WARRANT-IN CAMERA HEARING/X:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISCLOSE CRI IS DENIED/CONTD:STATUS OF UNSEALING PORTIONS OF WARRANT/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE'S MOTTION TO UNSEAL WARRANT;DA OPPO DEF MOTION/X:COURT WILL HOLD AN IN CAMERA HEARING/CONTD:DECISION ON DEFENSE'S MOTION TO UNSEAL WARRANT/DOP/

/PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL IS UANBLE TO ATTEND COURT DUE TO ILLNESS/CAUSE/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPOSITION/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL COULD NOT MAKE AN APPEARANCE; COUNSEL CALLED THE COURT ROOM AND REQUESTED TO CONTINUE MATTER TO 11-20-18/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
